activities_projects.title: Central Idea Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the main theme of the poem
steps: Read the poem carefully
Identify what the poet enjoys during the rainy night
Write the central idea of the poem in 3-4 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the main theme of the poem

activities_projects.title: Stanza Interpretation
activities_projects.objective: Analyze the meaning of each stanza
steps: Divide the poem into three stanzas
Write the main idea of each stanza
Explain how the poet's thoughts change from one stanza to another

activities_projects.title: Imagery Identification
activities_projects.objective: Recognize imagery used in the poem
steps: Find lines describing the rainy night
Write how the poet describes the sound of rain
Explain how these descriptions create imagery

activities_projects.title: Sound Imagery Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand auditory imagery in the poem
steps: Identify words that describe the sound of rain
Write how these sounds affect the poet's feelings
Explain why the sound of rain is soothing

activities_projects.title: Memory and Emotion Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of memories in the poem
steps: Write the memory the poet recalls about his mother
Explain why the memory is meaningful
Describe how the rain triggers these memories

activities_projects.title: Figure of Speech Identification
activities_projects.objective: Recognize literary devices in the poem
steps: Find examples of metaphor or personification in the poem
Write the lines where they appear
Explain their meaning

activities_projects.title: Group Discussion
steps: Discuss why the poet enjoys listening to rain
Share your ideas in a group
Write the final conclusion of the discussion

activities_projects.title: Personal Reflection Writing
activities_projects.objective: Relate the poem to personal experiences
steps: Think about a memory connected with rain
Write 5-6 sentences describing the memory
Explain how it makes you feel

activities_projects.title: Poetic Tone Activity
activities_projects.objective: Identify the tone and mood of the poem
steps: Read the poem carefully
Write the mood created by the rainy night
Explain how the poet expresses calmness and comfort
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands tone and mood in poetry

activities_projects.title: Creative Response Activity
steps: Imagine you are lying in a room during rain
Write a short paragraph describing the sounds and feelings
Share your description with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Improves descriptive and creative writing skills
